race.comment: CUTTIN' CLASS (4) dropped right out here when in the market last time out to be beaten some 25 lengths, clearly too bad to be true there with genuine post-race excuses. His form prior was rock solid and he can bounce back. KIJIVU (3) improved last start at Horsham when just finding one better, sitting on speed and only going down by a head. Tough draw but Meech can push forward and run another strong race. BAUDIN (12) resumes. The fresh run last time in at Donald was solid and she draws inside. HUGHIE'S SPIRIT (2) was good at Terang last time and has claims again. LIVE FOREVER (9) struggled on debut but is expected to improve quickly for the Hayes yard.
